summary: Completed comprehensive testing of bug fixes and new features for Asian Financial Market Prediction Platform. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Key bug fixes verified: 1) Empty search now returns empty array (not 422 error), 2) US stock market support working with AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL etc.

minor.issue: Chart width(-1) and height(-1) warnings in console - cosmetic issue

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint (200)
Backend: Markets list includes us_stock
Backend: US stock market returns 10 stocks (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA, META, TSLA, BRK-B, JPM, V)
Backend: AAPL stock detail with historical data
Backend: MSFT stock detail
Backend: Search for AAPL returns results
Backend: Empty search returns empty array (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: Whitespace search returns empty array
Backend: Partial search works
Backend: Market overview returns gainers/losers
Backend: A股 market endpoint
Backend: 港股 market endpoint
Backend: 期货 market endpoint
Backend: 外汇 market endpoint
Backend: AI prediction for US stock returns PhD-level analysis
Backend: AI prediction response structure validated
Backend: Divination prediction returns report
Backend: Stock detail for A股 (贵州茅台)
Backend: Stock detail for 港股 (腾讯)
Frontend: Homepage loads with 涨幅榜/跌幅榜
Frontend: US stock market page (/market/us_stock) shows 10 stocks
Frontend: Search functionality - AAPL search shows dropdown
Frontend: Empty search closes dropdown (no error)
Frontend: Navigation to AAPL stock detail
Frontend: AI prediction page - select AAPL and generate analysis
Frontend: AI prediction returns PhD-level report with 综合评分, 置信度
Frontend: Divination from stock detail page generates report
Frontend: K线图 (chart) displays historical data
critical_code_review_comments: Chart component console warnings about width/height (-1) are benign but could be cleaner
AI prediction may return fallback data if MiniMax API fails - handled gracefully
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs from iteration_2.json have been fixed: 1) Empty search now returns 200 with empty results array instead of 422, 2) US stock market is fully supported with AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL etc. All market pages, search, AI prediction, and divination features are working correctly.

features_verified.ai_prediction: VERIFIED - PhD-level analysis with 综合评分, 置信度, 市场结构分析
features_verified.divination: VERIFIED - Generates 金融天机推演报告
features_verified.search_functionality: VERIFIED - Search for AAPL works, navigates to stock detail
features_verified.stock_detail_chart: VERIFIED - K线图 displays historical data
